'''Equa Felens''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
He was a [[Major/Legends|Major]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and served in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]].

Prior to joining the Rebellion, he attended the [[Bacrana Educational Institute]] where he met [[Dara Gion]]. The two fell in love and later participated in an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] [[Amma protest|protest]] on [[Bacrana/Legends|Bacrana]]. They eventually joined the Rebel Alliance but drifted apart.
